test-case.description: loads enabled lifecycle subscriptions
test-case.name: RenderKit event/job bridge service.loads enabled lifecycle subscriptions

test-case.description: creates jobs for pending matching events
test-case.name: RenderKit event/job bridge service.creates jobs for pending matching events

test-case.description: marks processed events as no longer pending
test-case.name: RenderKit event/job bridge service.marks processed events as no longer pending

test-case.description: does not duplicate jobs for the same trigger event
test-case.name: RenderKit event/job bridge service.does not duplicate jobs for the same trigger event

test-case.description: exposes Preset as the cleanup selection parameter
test-case.name: RenderKit backup command contracts.exposes Preset as the cleanup selection parameter

test-case.description: exposes the upgraded backup job planning parameters
test-case.name: RenderKit backup command contracts.exposes the upgraded backup job planning parameters

test-case.description: exposes backup job control commands
test-case.name: RenderKit backup command contracts.exposes backup job control commands

test-case.description: uses only parameters supported by Get-CleanupRule
test-case.name: RenderKit backup command contracts.uses only parameters supported by Get-CleanupRule

test-case.description: queues a background BackupProject job with chunking and storage tiers
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.queues a background BackupProject job with chunking and storage tiers

test-case.description: builds storage tier cascade profiles with fallbacks
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.builds storage tier cascade profiles with fallbacks

test-case.description: copies and verifies archive artifacts across required storage tiers
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.copies and verifies archive artifacts across required storage tiers

test-case.description: blocks source release when a required tier cannot be verified
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.blocks source release when a required tier cannot be verified

test-case.description: allows safe delete only after archive, decode, and tier checks pass
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.allows safe delete only after archive, decode, and tier checks pass

test-case.description: blocks safe delete when decode validation fails
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.blocks safe delete when decode validation fails

test-case.description: blocks safe delete when the policy keeps the source
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.blocks safe delete when the policy keeps the source

test-case.description: removes the source project only after the storage verify chain succeeds
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.removes the source project only after the storage verify chain succeeds

test-case.description: records pause, resume, and cancel requests for a background BackupProject job
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.records pause, resume, and cancel requests for a background BackupProject job

test-case.description: analyzes project media files without requiring ffprobe
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.analyzes project media files without requiring ffprobe

test-case.description: plans resumable time-range chunks for timed media
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.plans resumable time-range chunks for timed media

test-case.description: snaps chunk boundaries to nearby keyframes when available
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.snaps chunk boundaries to nearby keyframes when available

test-case.description: builds ffmpeg encode and merge plans for chunked assets
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.builds ffmpeg encode and merge plans for chunked assets

test-case.description: skips completed chunk-index entries when rebuilding an encoding plan
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.skips completed chunk-index entries when rebuilding an encoding plan

test-case.description: plans scheduler lanes for controlled main video and parallel secondary media
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.plans scheduler lanes for controlled main video and parallel secondary media

test-case.description: validates merged assets for container, streams, and sync drift
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.validates merged assets for container, streams, and sync drift

test-case.description: maps codec and GPU selections to concrete ffmpeg encoders
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.maps codec and GPU selections to concrete ffmpeg encoders

test-case.description: detects hardware encoder capabilities from ffmpeg encoders and GPU hints
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.detects hardware encoder capabilities from ffmpeg encoders and GPU hints

test-case.description: uses GPU capabilities for automatic encoder selection
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.uses GPU capabilities for automatic encoder selection

test-case.description: falls back to CPU when Auto has no usable hardware encoder for the codec
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.falls back to CPU when Auto has no usable hardware encoder for the codec

test-case.description: persists and reads the GPU capability cache
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.persists and reads the GPU capability cache

test-case.description: parses ffmpeg progress lines into percentages
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.parses ffmpeg progress lines into percentages

test-case.description: builds structured progress snapshots with speed and ETA
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.builds structured progress snapshots with speed and ETA

test-case.description: runs the BackupProject worker handler when no encoding is required
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.runs the BackupProject worker handler when no encoding is required

test-case.description: creates a v2 backup manifest with pipeline metadata

test-case.description: does not create the configuration directory when only resolving its path
